xy.t: n. 正常男性染色体组型
xy.d: n. (genetics) normal complement of sex hormones in a male

xylamide.d:
n. An acid amide derivative of xylic acid, obtained as a
   white crystalline substance.

xylanthrax.d:
n. Wood coal, or charcoal; -- so called in distinction
   from mineral coal.

xylaria.t: [网络] 炭角菌属；炭棒菌属；炭团菌属

xylariaceae.t: [网络] 炭角菌科；炭棒科；鹿角菌科

xylazine.t: 甲苯噻嗪(镇静, 镇痛, 肌松药)

xylem.t:
n. 木质部
[医] 木质部(植物纤维束的)
xylem.d: n. the woody part of plants: the supporting and water-conducting tissue, consisting primarily of tracheids and vessels

xylene.t:
n. 二甲苯
[化] 二甲苯
xylene.d: n. a colorless flammable volatile liquid hydrocarbon used as a solvent

xylene dichloride.t: [化] 二氯二甲苯; 二氯代二甲苯

xylene dihalide.t: [化] 二卤二甲苯; 二卤代二甲苯

xylene musk.t: [化] 二甲苯麝香; 三硝基二甲叔丁苯

xylenediol.t: [化] 二羟甲基苯; 苯二甲醇

xylenin.t: [医] 结核杆菌二甲苯浸质(一种结核菌毒)

xylenobacillin.t: [医] 结核杆菌二甲苯浸质(一种结核菌毒)

xylenol.d:
n. Any one of six metameric phenol derivatives of xylene,
   obtained as crystalline substances, (CH3)2.C6H3.OH.

xylenol carboxylic acid.t: [化] 二甲苯酚酸; 二甲苯酚羧酸

xylic.t: a. 木质部的； 二甲苯甲酸的

xylic acid.t:
二甲苯酸, 二甲苯甲酸
[化] 二甲苯甲酸

xylidic acid.t:
[化] 4-甲基-1,3-苯二甲酸
[医] 甲苯二酸

xylidine.t:
n. 二甲代苯胺
[化] 二甲苯胺
xylidine.d:
n. Any one of six metameric hydrocarbons, (CH3)2.C6H3.NH2,
   resembling aniline, and related to xylene. They are liquids, or easily
   fusible crystalline substances, of which three are derived from
   metaxylene, two from orthoxylene, and one from paraxylene. They are
   called the amido xylenes.

xylindein.t: [医] 盘菌木素, 碗菌木素(染料)
xylindein.d:
n. A green or blue pigment produced by Peziza in certain
   kinds of decayed wood, as the beech, oak, birch, etc., and extracted as
   an amorphous powder resembling indigo.

xylite.d: n. A liquid hydrocarbon found in crude wood spirits.

xylite-phthalic resin.t: [化] 邻苯二甲酸木糖树脂

xylitone.d:
n. A yellow oil having a geraniumlike odor, produced as a
   side product in making phorone; -- called also xylite oil.

xylo.t: 利多卡因、硫双二氯酚、维生素D2复合制剂(消炎、镇痛外用药)

xylo-.d:
A combining form from Gr. xy`lon wood; as in xylogen,
   xylograph.

xylobalsamum.d:
n. The dried twigs of a Syrian tree (Balsamodendron
   Gileadense).

xylocaine.t: n. [药]赛罗卡因,利多卡因,木卡因
xylocaine.d: n a local anesthetic (trade names Lidocaine and Xylocaine) used topically on the skin and mucous membranes

xylocarpous.d: a. Bearing fruit which becomes hard or woody.

xylogen.t: n. 木质素, 木纤维
xylogen.d:
n. Nascent wood; wood cells in a forming state.
n. Lignin.

xylograph.t: n. 木版, 木版画, 木刻版
xylograph.d:
n. An engraving on wood, or the impression from such an
   engraving; a print by xylography.

xylographic.t: a. 木刻的, 木版的, 木版画的

xylographical.t: a. 木刻的, 木版的, 木版画的
xylographical.d: a. Of or pertaining to xylography, or wood engraving.

xylography.t: n. 木刻(术), 木版画印画法
xylography.d:
n. The art of engraving on wood.
n. The art of making prints from the natural grain of
   wood.
n. A method pf printing in colors upon wood for purposes
   of house decoration.

xyloid.t: a. 木质的, 似木质的
xyloid.d: a. Resembling wood; having the nature of wood.

xyloidin.t: [医] 木炸药, 赛劳丁硝化淀粉(一种炸药)
xyloidin.d:
n. A substance resembling pyroxylin, obtained by the action
   of nitric acid on starch; -- called also nitramidin.

xylol.t:
n. 混合二甲苯
[化] 二甲苯
xylol.d: n a colorless flammable volatile liquid hydrocarbon used as a solvent

xylolite.t: (水泥与锯屑制成的)木花[屑]板, 菱苦土木屑板

xylometazoline.t: 丁苄唑啉(拟肾上腺素药)

xylonic acid.t:
[化] 木质酸
[医] 木糖酸

xylonite.t:
n. (英)赛璐珞, 假象牙
[医] 赛璐珞, 假象牙

xylopal.t: [化] 木蛋白石; 木化石

xylophagan.d:
n. One of a tribe of beetles whose larvae bore or live in
   wood.
n. Any species of Xylophaga.
n. Any one of the Xylophagides.

xylophagous.t: a. 食木的, 蚀木的, 蛀木的
xylophagous.d:
a. Eating, boring in, or destroying, wood; -- said
   especially of certain insect larvae, crustaceans, and mollusks.
a. Of or pertaining to the genus Xylophaga.

xylophilous.t: a. 喜木的,适木的,木生的
xylophilous.d: a. Of or pertaining to the xylophilans.

xylophone.d: n a percussion instrument with wooden bars tuned to produce a chromatic scale and with resonators; played with small mallets

xylophones.t: n. 木琴( xylophone的复数形式 )
xylophones.d: n. a percussion instrument with wooden bars tuned to produce a chromatic scale and with resonators; played with small mallets

xylophonist.d: n. someone who plays a xylophone

xylophonists.t: 木琴演奏家( xylophonist的名词复数 )

xylopia.t: [网络] 木瓣树属；非洲常绿树

xylopropamine.t: [化] 二甲苯丙胺; 赛洛丙胺

xylopyranose.t:
[化] 吡喃木糖; 六环木糖
[医] 吡喃木糖, 木糖

xylopyrography.d:
n. The art or practice of burning pictures on wood
   with a hot iron; -- called also poker painting. See Poker picture,
   under Poker.

xyloquinone.d:
n. Any one of a group of quinone compounds obtained
   respectively by the oxidation of certain xylidine compounds. In general
   they are yellow crystalline substances.

xylorcinol.t: (=4, 6-dimethylresorcinol) 木间二酚, 4, 6-二甲基苯间二酚

xylose.d: n a sugar extracted from wood or straw; used in foods for diabetics

xylose clearance test.t: [医] 木糖廓清试验(检肾机能)

xylose coacentration test.t: [医] 木糖浓缩试验(检肾机能)

xylose tolerance test.t: [医] 木糖耐量试验(检肾机能)

xylosidoglucose.t: [医] 木糖葡萄糖甙, 樱草糖, 报春花糖

xylosma.d: n shrub or small tree grown as an ornamental in mild climates for its neat evergreen foliage and fragrant late flowers; native of China

xylosone.t: 木酮(醛)糖, 戊沙罗糖

xylostein.d:
n. A glucoside found in the poisonous berries of a species
   of honeysuckle (Lonicera xylosteum), and extracted as a bitter, white,
   crystalline substance.

xylotherapy.t: [医] 木[质]疗法(暗示疗法的一种)

xylotomous.t: a. 能钻木的, 有蚀木能力的

xylotomy.t: n. 木材解剖术, 木材切片术

xylotrya.d:
n. A genus of marine bivalves closely allied to Teredo, and
   equally destructive to timber. One species (Xylotrya fimbriata) is very
   common on the Atlantic coast of the United States.

xylyl.t:
n. 二甲苯基, 甲苄基
[化] 二甲苯基; 甲苄基
xylyl.d:
n. Any one of three metameric radicals which are characteristic
   respectively of the three xylenes.

xylyl alcohol.t: [化] 苯二甲醇; 甲基苄醇

xylyl bromide.t: [医] 溴化二甲苯, 溴化苄

xylyl hydrazine.t: [化] 二甲苯肼; 甲苄基肼

xylyl-mercaptan.t: [化] 苯二甲硫醇; 甲苄基

xylylene.t:
n. 苯撑二甲基
[化] 苯二甲基

xyphoid.t:
n. 剑状软骨, 剑状突起
a. 剑状的

xyridaceae.d: n. plants of tropical to temperate regions; usually in wet places

xyris.d:
n. A genus of endogenous herbs with grassy leaves and small
   yellow flowers in short, scaly-bracted spikes; yellow-eyed grass. There
   are about seventeen species in the Atlantic United States.

xysma.t: [医] 絮片, 假膜片(见于腹泻粪便中)

xyst.t: n. 门廊, 林木夹道

xystarch.d: n. An office/ having the superintendence of the xyst.

xyster.t:
n. 刮骨刀, 骨刮
[医] 括骨刀, 骨刮, 刮器
xyster.d:
n. An instrument for scraping bones.
   Y () Y, the twenty-fifth letter of the English alphabet, at the
   beginning of a word or syllable, except when a prefix (see Y-), is
   usually a fricative vocal consonant; as a prefix, and usually in the
   middle or at the end of a syllable, it is a vowel. See Guide to
   Pronunciation, // 145, 178-9, 272.

xystus.t: n. 古希腊室内运动场
xystus.d:
n. A long and open portico, for athletic exercises, as
   wrestling, running, etc., for use in winter or in stormy weather.

xyy.t: [医][=an abnormal sex chromosome type]一种异常性染色体组型
